# latest-ref

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Latest-value ref idiom as a primitive: useLatestRef(value) mirrors the latest value into a ref written in render (read only in callbacks/effects), and useEventCallback(fn) is the stable-identity callback built on it. The single sanctioned home + exemption for the idiom, so react-hooks/refs can be enforced at error.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps`, `apps/sonata/audio/engine`, `apps/sonata/controls`, `apps/sonata/piano-roll`, `apps/sonata/primitives/inertial-drag`, `apps/sonata/shell`, `apps/surface/floating`, `conversations/conversation-view/prompt-input`, `conversations/conversation-view/push-and-exit`, `debug/logs`, `debug/slow-ops`, `layouts/miller`, `page/code-block`, `page/editor`, `page/inline-date`, `page/inline-page-link`, `page/math/inline`, `primitives/css/color-picker`, `primitives/data-view`, `primitives/data-view/view-core`, `primitives/editable-field`, `primitives/live-state`, `primitives/markdown`, `primitives/networking`, `primitives/optimistic-mutation`, `primitives/pane`, `primitives/prompt-editor/voice-input`, `primitives/scoped-store`, `primitives/shortcuts`, `primitives/sync-status`, `primitives/terminal`, `primitives/text-editor`, `primitives/undo-redo`, `reorder`, `screenshot`
- Web:
  - Exports: Values: `useEventCallback`, `useLatestRef`
